rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE CARLOS AND MARTA P. RAMIREZ 1996 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents Manuela Ramirezs And Cres Ramirezs Demurrer To First Amended Petition And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: This matter is taken off calendar. A demurrer is not the proper vehicle to address the issues raised with respect to the First Amended Petition ("FAP"). Those issues are more appropriately addressed via objections to the FAP, which would be handled on the Court's morning probate calendar.
